name: Omarchy
description: Opinionated Arch Linux + Hyprland desktop distribution curated by DHH for developers — preconfigured tiling setup.

seo.title: Omarchy — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Omarchy: Opinionated Arch Linux + Hyprland desktop distribution curated by DHH for developers — preconfigured tiling setup.

when_to_use: Preconfigured Arch + Hyprland setup for a developer workstation
DHH-curated opinionated Linux desktop for Rails developers
Tiling workspace environment optimized for keyboard usage
Quick Linux desktop setup without manual Hyprland configuration
Developer-focused Linux distro for those switching from macOS

cons: Still Arch under the hood long-term
DHHs opinions wont match yours always
review.verdict: Fastest way to a DHH-approved tiling Linux desktop — just remember its still Arch once you customize.
review.best_for: Developers curious about Hyprland tiling who want a curated Arch starting point
review.not_for: Users wanting stability guarantees or desktops outside DHHs aesthetic
